name: Turkey-Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Wagon Wheel or Spiral Pasta, Cooked and Drained
2 cups Cooked Turkey or Chicken, Strips; About 8 ounces
1 cup Whole Kernel Corn OR, Dried, 1 Can
1 large Zucchini, Cut Into Half-Inch Slices, Then Quartered
1 large Tomato, Cut Into Half-Inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut red bell pepper into chunks.
2. Chop cilantro or parsley.
3. Mix picante sauce, dressing, and salt in a small bowl until blended.
4. Combine pasta, turkey, corn, zucchini, tomato, red bell pepper, and cilantro in a large bowl.
5. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture and toss gently to coat all ingredients.
6. Refrigerate. Serve with additional picante sauce if desired.
